title: Ai Helper
description: Chat with AI directly in your Minecraft world! Transform your Minecraft experience by bringing the power of artificial intelligence right into your game. No more alt-tabbing to ask questions or get help
body:
# 🤖 AI Chat Helper

**Chat with AI directly in your Minecraft world!**

Transform your Minecraft experience by bringing the power of artificial intelligence right into your game. No more alt-tabbing to ask questions or get help - just type a command and get instant AI responses in chat!

## ✨ Features

### 🌍 **Multi-Language Support**
- Automatically detects your game language
- Supports **6 languages**: English, Turkish, Russian, German, French, and Spanish
- All UI elements and book content adapt to your language

### 🤖 **Multiple AI Providers**
- **Free AI** (Groq) - Works out of the box, no setup required!
- **ChatGPT** - Industry-leading conversational AI
- **Gemini** - Google's powerful language model
- **Claude** - Anthropic's helpful AI assistant  
- **DeepSeek** - Advanced reasoning capabilities

![Multiple AI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/A6tXgYop/images/317a232287153bbd8badc218d1be4e871362e712.png)

### 📚 **In-Game Guide Book**
- Receive a helpful guide book when you first join
- Contains all commands and instructions
- Beautiful, readable formatting with proper colors
- Automatically translated to your language

![Usage-Book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/A6tXgYop/images/4df287eef15c7ac150d5e429245378f5a01ffc51.png)

### ⚡ **Simple Commands**

```
/ai <message> - Chat with AI using your default provider
/ai chatgpt <api_key> - Set ChatGPT as default and configure API key
/ai gemini <api_key> - Set Gemini as default and configure API key
/ai claude <api_key> - Set Claude as default and configure API key
/ai deepseek <api_key> - Set DeepSeek as default and configure API key
/ai help - Show command help
```


## 🚀 Why Choose AI Chat Helper?

### **🆓 Works Immediately**
No configuration needed! The mod comes with a free AI provider that works right away.

### **🔒 Your API Keys, Your Control**
- API keys are stored locally on your client
- Switch between providers anytime
- Use your own premium API keys for better responses

### **🌐 True Multilingual**
- Not just English! Full support for major languages
- UI adapts to your Minecraft language settings
- No language barriers to getting help

### **⚙️ Developer Friendly**
- Clean, well-structured code
- Easy to understand and modify
- Built with modern Minecraft modding practices

### **🎮 Seamless Integration**
- No external applications needed
- Works in singleplayer and multiplayer
- Lightweight and efficient

## 📋 Requirements

- **Minecraft 1.21.8**
- **Fabric Loader 0.17.2+**
- **Fabric API**

## 🔧 Quick Setup

1. Install the mod
2. Join your world
3. Read the guide book you receive
4. Start chatting with `/ai hello`!

For premium AI providers, just set your API key once and you're ready to go!

## 💡 Use Cases

- **Get building inspiration**: `/ai give me ideas for a medieval castle`
- **Learn game mechanics**: `/ai how do I make a redstone clock?`
- **Creative writing**: `/ai write a backstory for my character`
- **Problem solving**: `/ai my farm isn't working, what could be wrong?`
- **Language practice**: Chat in different languages!

![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/A6tXgYop/images/bb0fcc6ea168c2cfb56827aa5314ba4be551efda.png)

## 🤝 Perfect For

- **Casual players** who want quick help without leaving the game
- **Builders** seeking creative inspiration
- **Redstone engineers** needing technical assistance  
- **Multiplayer servers** wanting to add AI assistance for players
- **Content creators** looking for interactive elements

---

**Ready to revolutionize your Minecraft experience? Download now and start chatting with AI in-game!**

*Made with ❤️ by 3yw_*
